auth.secure_sign_in: Secure sign in for role-based healthcare access
auth.use_demo: Use the demo flow to explore the secure routing, protected dashboards, and multilingual shell.

home.title: AI powered rural healthcare infrastructure built for India’s last mile
home.description: A scalable, multilingual PWA that helps citizens find care, ASHA workers manage field operations, doctors coordinate care, and administrators monitor outcomes.
home.platform_goals_title: Healthcare access with measurable operational depth
home.platform_goals_description: The system is structured for interoperability, traceability, and low-friction adoption across community clinics and outreach visits.
home.deployment_targets_value: Community clinics, outreach vans, and district health centers

sidebar.one_platform: One platform for citizens, ASHA workers, doctors, and administrators.

dashboard.citizen_title: Manage your care, records, and reminders in one place
dashboard.citizen_description: The citizen dashboard is optimized for daily healthcare interactions, family tracking, and emergency support.
dashboard.doctor_title: Clinical workflow for patient review, prescriptions, and appointments
dashboard.doctor_description: Supports triage, longitudinal care, and concise handoff summaries for efficient practice in distributed settings.
dashboard.asha_title: Field operations and household outreach for community health
dashboard.asha_description: Tools to manage visits, register health events, and coach families in low-bandwidth settings.
dashboard.admin_title: Administration, analytics, and role management for healthcare operations
dashboard.admin_description: Monitor platform usage, manage access, and export reports for program leadership and district reviews.

patient_list.title: Patient list
patient_list.description: Review citizens and referred patients in one queue.

medical_history.title: Medical history
medical_history.description: Access prior records, labs, and referral notes.

prescription_management.title: Prescription management
prescription_management.description: Issue treatment plans and digital prescriptions.

medication_review.title: Medication review
medication_review.description: Check adherence and current medicine history.

voice_input_support.title: Voice input support
voice_input_support.description: Capture notes using future voice-enabled AI workflows.

user_management.title: User management
user_management.description: Manage account status, permissions, and verification flows.

analytics_dashboard.title: Analytics dashboard
analytics_dashboard.description: Track adoption, usage, and service indicators.

reports_dashboard.title: Reports dashboard
reports_dashboard.description: Export summaries for policy and program reporting.

security_overview.title: Security overview
security_overview.description: Review access logs, auth events, and risk flags.

deployment_readiness.title: Deployment readiness
deployment_readiness.description: Track environment health and feature rollout status.

emergency.title: Emergency contacts
emergency.description: Fast access to local emergency numbers, ASHA contacts, and caregiver details.
emergency.help_text: Use the backend to sync emergency contacts, vaccination status, prescriptions, and AI health guidance.

features.ai_symptom_support_description: Guided symptom intake and triage using lightweight AI models.
features.multilingual_access_description: Content and workflows localized for local languages and dialects.
features.offline_first_description: Data sync and queueing built for intermittent connectivity.
features.secure_role_control_description: Strong access controls and role-based routing for clinical safety.
features.digital_health_records_description: Persistent, portable records with consented sharing across providers.
features.rural_first_description: Design patterns tuned for low literacy and constrained networks.

health_highlights: Multilingual guidance for Hindi, Gondi, Halbi, and Chhattisgarhi speakers.
Offline-first workflows for low bandwidth rural environments.
Role-based dashboards for citizens, ASHA workers, doctors, and administrators.
AI assistance for symptoms, report summaries, and health education.

contact.title: Contact support and partnerships
contact.description: Reach out for deployments, integrations, or technical support.

about.title: Built for rural India
about.description: An open architecture and reference implementation for community healthcare delivery.

services.title: What we provide
services.description: Deployment, training, and lightweight AI services tailored for public health.

forgot_password.title: Recover account access securely
forgot_password.description: Forgot-password flows can later be wired to email or mobile OTP and a verified reset token workflow.
forgot_password.help_text: This scaffold includes the dedicated route and UI surface for recovery, but leaves transport integration to your backend implementation.

not_found.title: The requested route does not exist
not_found.description: Use the navigation shell to move between the public pages and role-based dashboards.
